item.title: Yamaha BBP35II Pro Series 5-String Bass Guitar - Midnight Blue — $1,766.39
item.description:
$1,766.39 · Brand New · Piano Heritage Inc

Yamaha BBP35IIMB Details

YGD Custom V7 Pickups with Alnico magnets that produce a fat yet penetrating tone.

The Yamaha BBP35II MB is a Midnight Blue BB Pro 35 Series 5 String RH Bass Guitar.

Made in Japan, this is the ultimate BB, featuring an Alder/Maple/Alder construction treated with Yamaha's unique IRA technology, a six-bolt miter neck joint, and a diagonally strung convertible bridge.

The Ultimate BB
For the bassist that won't settle for anything less than the best, the Pro lineup represents the pinnacle of everything the BB designers have sought to achieve over four decades of striving for perfection. Carefully crafted one at a time by a select team of master artisans at Yamaha's headquarters in Japan, and featuring a unique Alder/Maple/Alder laminated construction finished with Yamaha's proprietary IRA (initial response acceleration) technology, the Pro BB offers a rich, organic tone and incomparable resonance and playability-this is the bass that you've always dreamed of.

Alder/Maple/Alder Body Construction
The new BB features an Alder/Maple/Alder multi-laminated body construction. The hard maple center increases body stiffness and accentuates midrange to cut through the mix of a band, and allows a more uniform transmission of vibrations between the body and the maple neck for unparalleled resonance and sustain.

6-bolt Miter Neck Joint
Miter bolting holds the neck closer and tighter to the body fusing these two separate components into one. Compared to a conventional bolt-on joint, miter bolting offers more efficient transfer of string vibration throughout the body, for improved sustain and outstanding resonance that brings every note to life.

YGD Custom V7 Pickups
Alnico magnets produce a fat yet penetrating tone that works in combination with the unique Alder/Maple/Alder construction of the 700 and Pro models for an organic, well-defined sound.

Control
The new BB models are equipped with one tone control and two volume control knobs, for versatile sound shaping.

Convertible Bridge and Saddle for Precise Tone Shaping: Vintage Plus Bridge
The 700 and Pro are equipped with the Vintage Plus Bridge, which incorporates "Diagonal Body Thru Stringing," where strings are angled at the saddle and pass through the instrument to the bridge at a 45º angle, as opposed to the traditional vertical stringing method which places more stress on the strings.

Diagonal Body Thru Stringing significantly reduces this stress while transferring string vibration to the body reliably and efficiently.

Strings can also be set to the tail end of the bridge, which comes equipped with a convertible saddle that can be adjusted to 2 different angles for more precise tonal shaping and feel. The rounder side of the saddle gives a slightly softer sound, while the more angled area produces a slightly tighter one.

The brass saddle of the Vintage Plus Bridge delivers a slightly deeper low-end, and the steel bridge plate offers a brighter tone. All screws and springs are made of stainless steel to guard against corrosion.

*Long-scale strings are recommended when stringing through the bridge and super long-scale strings are recommended when stringing through the body.

Five-piece Neck
The new series features a 5-ply maple and mahogany laminated neck, in a bolt-on design that delivers a sharp attack, and quick response. This durable construction resists warping and twisting and adds the tight, penetrating character of maple combined with the warmth of mahogany to the instrument's tone.

New Neck Shape
The New BB models feature a slightly thinner neck than previous BB basses, improving playability and feel for both modern and traditional players.

Lightweight Tuners
Lighter weight tuners offer a better balance and complement the overall feel, providing a perfect match for the smaller, lighter body of the new BB.

I.R.A. (Initial Response Acceleration)

Any bass benefits from being "played in," a process in which the instrument matures and opens up as the stresses between the wood and finish, neck and fingerboard, and body and hardware are released, resulting in better sound and playability.

Yamaha's exclusive Initial Response Acceleration (IRA) technology releases those stresses by applying specific vibrations to the completed instruments as part of the crafting process and gives a "played in" bass from day one.

Features:

  • Alder / Maple/ Alder Body Construction
  • 6-Bolt Miter Neck Joint
  • 5-piece Neck
  • YGD Custom V7 Pickups (AlnicoV)
  • Vintage Plus Bridge: Convertible Bridge and Saddle
  • Lightweight Open Gear Tuners
  • I.R.A Treatment
  • Made in Japan
  • Finish: Midnight Blue
  • Number of Strings: 5
  • Hardshell Case included

Includes Vintage Plus Bridge that is convertible.

item.title: 【used】Fender Japan / PB62-53 3TS 1997~2000 3.99kg #O076477 Crafted in Japan【GIB Hyogo】【price included SHIPPING & IMPORT TAX & VAT】 — $1,266
item.description:
$1,266 · Good · Bass Shop Geek IN Box

Fender is, of course, the number one brand of electric guitars and basses.

It's loved by countless top artists, including James Jamerson, Bobby Vega, and Michael League.

The Precision Bass, the world's first fretted solid-body electric bass, instantly captivated bassists worldwide.

Its brilliance remains unchanged and beloved even more than half a century after its creation.

Fender Japan started in the 1980s as a Japanese-made Fender, but unfortunately, it has now been discontinued and integrated into Fender itself.

However, the brand's quality is still supported by many artists and continues to be sought after.

This model is a PB62, faithfully reproducing the style of the 1962 PB.

The body is made of basswood, and the fingerboard is rosewood.

Basswood may not be the most popular wood, but its bright, resonant tone seems particularly well-suited to the PB.

Its lightweight design is also a major advantage.

This is a great bass guitar that combines excellent playability, typical of Japanese-made instruments, with the open nuances characteristic of Fender.

The frets have approximately 80% remaining.

The truss rod is stiff, but it has been confirmed to move approximately 90 degrees.

The neck is in good condition.

The body and paintwork show some small dents and buckle scratches. The metal parts show some tarnishing.

The electronics are in good condition.

No obvious modifications were observed.

Controls: Volume, Tone
Nut Width: 42.4mm
Bridge String Spacing: 20mm
Scale Length: 34 Inch
Year of Manufacture: 1997-2000
Country of Manufacture: JAPAN

During setup, we used our original GIB BASIC / Standard Bass Strings.

These strings are characterized by their straightforward sound and stable playability, naturally bringing out the instrument's inherent character.

These are highly reliable strings that we actually use in our repair and setup workshops.

Please enjoy these strings, which aim to be a new standard for bassists.

They are delivered after being adjusted for easy playability by GIB's craftsmen.

Accessories: Soft case

Text: Shunsuke Saga

Inspector: Kawami

Product photos: Lee

GIB 3-month warranty included

(Warranty is only valid for purchases made within Japan)

●Price includes VAT & Duties & Shipping Fee
Free Shipping Worldwide. All import duties and taxes are included in the price. There are no hidden fees upon delivery.

If you return a product, you will be responsible for all shipping and customs fees.

Note: All electronic devices, such as effect pedals and amplifiers, are set for use in Japan.
Please be sure to check the voltage and power specifications of your country before purchasing and using.

item.title: Limited Edition Squier by Fender Paranormal Rascal Bass HH (Shell Pink) — $350
item.description:
$350 · Very Good · Deadbolts Musical Emporium

Selling an excellent condition bass. Plays and sounds amazing but I just bought another bass and need to trim the collection down. This is technically a short scale bass.

It's an amazing color. I added a custom white pearloid pickup to it. It will also include the original tortoiseshell pick guard. The only flaw is the two small scuffs on the side of the body (see picture). Other then that, it's basically new.

The Paranormal Rascal™ Bass HH rewrites the playbook of electric bass design with a greatest-hits-list of features from several eccentric 1960s-era Fender® bass models. Combining the offset body shape of the Fender Bass VI model, the unique headstock shape from the Fender Coronado Bass, the string-through-body bridge from the Mustang® Bass, and punchy dual Fender-Designed Wide Range humbucking bass pickups (HH) with 3-way switching, this model amounts to something truly great. Short and easy-to-play 30" scale length, a slim and comfortable "C"-shape neck profile.

this bass is perfect ! no dings, like new! recent refin into beautiful blue burst over flamed maple top by Pat Wilkens (who shoots most of Roger's basses). recently dressed frets. plays perfectly and sounds just as good. comes with original Sadowsky case.

item.title: Schecter J-4 bass in Sea Foam Green — $999
item.description:
$999 · Brand New · Studio Gears

Schecter J-4 Electric Bass in Sea Foam Green

The J-4 delivers a balanced, comfortable playing experience with its Thin 'C' neck contour and 34" scale, making it equally at home in extended sessions or quick studio work. The Sea Foam Green finish stands out visually while the instrument's 9 lbs 4 oz weight keeps fatigue minimal during performance. This is a straightforward, well-equipped four-string designed for players who value reliability and sonic flexibility.

Playability & Comfort

The Thin 'C' neck with graduated thickness (0.787" at the 1st fret, 0.866" at the 12th fret) provides quick access across the fretboard without sacrificing stability or response. 21 Narrow X-jumbo frets and a 16" radius maple fingerboard enable clean articulation and smooth bending, while the Graph Tech XL Ivory Tusq nut (1.496" width) ensures consistent string spacing and tone clarity from open positions.

Tone & Electronics

The Schecter USA MonsterTone-J pickup set (bridge and neck) delivers punchy mids and articulate highs characteristic of J-style voicing, with genuine output suitable for both passive and modern amp setups. The Volume/Volume/Tone control with Push-Pull Coil-Tap function provides tonal sculpting options, allowing quick switches between fuller and tighter sonic characters without reaching for external gear.

Key Features
  • Alder body with bolt-on maple neck construction
  • Sea Foam Green finish
  • 34" scale length with Thin 'C' neck contour
  • Maple fingerboard with 16" radius and 21 Narrow X-jumbo frets
  • Graph Tech XL Ivory Tusq nut, 1.496" width
  • Schecter USA MonsterTone-J pickup set (bridge and neck)
  • Volume/Volume/Master Tone with Push-Pull Coil-Tap
  • Schecter Custom Bass String Thru Bridge
  • Black hardware throughout
  • Schecter tuners
  • Pickguard included
  • 9 lbs 4 oz weight
  • Right-handed orientation
  • Made in Indonesia

The J-4 combines solid construction, practical electronics, and genuine playability in a package that works equally well for working musicians and serious hobbyists.

item.title: Charvel Star Bass Black 1983 w/OHSC (Refret) — $2,499.99
item.description:
$2,499.99 · Good · DIABLO GUITARS - AXES OF EVIL!

Vintage Charvel Star Bass in Black finish made in 1983 with Original Hard Shell Case. This guitar features a solid bound poplar body, maple neck and rosewood fingerboard. Equipped with its original set of Charvel P and J-Style pickups in the neck and bridge positions. Controlled by 2 volume pots and 1 tone pot comprised of its original Centralab pots dating to the 11th week of 1983. The 34" scale length neck has white dot inlays and white side markers with 21 jumbo frets on a 16" radius with a medium "C" profile. The hardware is comprised of black Charvel Open Gear tuning machines with Y-Shape heads, a graphite nut, a Charvel 4-Saddle Adjustable bridge and gold knurled dome knobs.

This guitar is in overall good condition. At some point in its life it received a refret. There are light surface marks and small dings/dents throughout the guitar. The fretboard has some small chips near some of the frets. Some of the hardware has light rust/patina. The back of the neck has some dark discoloration. The tuning machines show wear and some pitting in the finish. There is belt rash on the back and some heavier dings on the tips of the points that go to the wood. The top of the case has stickers and one of the hinges on the bottom has lost its rivets, but it still functions properly. (See Pics)

Guitar is freshly setup and restrung with 45-100 strings. Includes Original Hard Shell Case.

Includes hardshell case.

item.title: Cort Action PJ Open Pore Walnut — $359.90
item.description:
$359.90 · Brand New · Wentworth Music

Affordable but loaded with quality materials, components and craftsmanship, the Action Series basses define value for the aspiring bass player with versatile features as PJ, JJ and soapbar pickup options and active EQ electronics. Action PJ features PJ pickup set, P-type bass pickup is ideal for genres such as hard rock, classic rock while the J-type pickup is well-suited for jazz and pop. This combination provides a wealth of classic bass sounds for virtually any musical genre and style.

Features

PJ Pickup Set
The P-type bass pickup is ideal for genres such as hard rock, classic rock while the J-type pickup is well-suited for jazz and pop. This combination provides a wealth of classic bass sounds for virtually any musical genre and style.

Ergonomic Body Shape
Found only on the Action Series basses, the ergonomic body shape, which fuses the best elements of classic and modern designs, was designed to reduce fatigue and enhance playability for extended playing sessions.

Die-Cast Machineheads
Precisely manufactured for the utmost in tuning stability and functionality, Cort’s die-cast tuners assure that you can play each note with confidence and authority.

Open Pore Finish
The openpore finishes bring out the natural beauty of the woods on the Action PJ while improving the acoustic resonance of the instrument.

Specifications

CUTAWAY: Double Cutaway
BODY: Poplar
NECK: Canadian Hard Maple
FRETBOARD: Jatoba (400mm(15.75") Radius)

item.title: Used Breedlove Solo BJ350/CME4 Acoustic Bass w/ Original Hard Shell Case — $659
item.description:
$659 · Very Good · Salim's Gear Exchange

The Breedlove Atlas Solo Bass (model BJ350/CMe4) is a highly-regarded, 4-string acoustic-electric bass. Originally handcrafted in Korea, it features a distinct monitor soundhole on the instrument's upper bout for live player feedback, and utilizes the JLD Bridge Truss system for increased structural stability and acoustic resonance. 

Core Specifications

  • Body Style: Concert Deep body with soft cutaway
  • Top Wood: Solid Western Red Cedar
  • Back & Sides: Laminated Mahogany
  • Neck: Mahogany
  • Fretboard: Rosewood (available in both fretted and fretless configurations)
  • Electronics: L.R. Baggs LR-T CV Tuner Preamp with 3-band EQ, presence, and phase controls
  • Bracing: Breedlove bass bracing with JLD Bridge Truss system
  • Hardware: Chrome Grover tuning keys

Key Features

  • Player's Monitor Soundhole: This unique port directs acoustic sound directly to the player's ear, making it much easier to hear yourself when performing live without needing a dedicated monitor wedge. 
  • JLD Bridge Truss System: Relieves tension on the top of the instrument, preventing bellying over time while enhancing sustain, clarity, and low-end projection.
  • Electronics: Built with premium L.R. Baggs preamps, making it easy to plug directly into an amp or soundboard.

item.title: Fender American Vintage II 1966 Jazz Bass Lake Placid Blue — $2,699.99
item.description:
$2,699.99 · Brand New · Rainbow Guitars

Item: FE0190170802

Actual Photos of Bass

Serial # V2601363

Weight 8lbs 130z.

The Fender® American Vintage II series presents a remarkably accurate take on the revolutionary designs that altered the course of musical history. Built with period-accurate bodies, necks and hardware, premium finishes and meticulously voiced, year-specific pickups, each instrument captures the essence of authentic Fender craftsmanship and tone.

When Don Randall at Fender Sales requested a more sophisticated, high-end bass model, the now iconic Jazz Bass® was the result. The neck was narrower at the nut, providing a faster and more effortless feel and the sleek new body style mirrored the offset contoured style of the Jazzmaster. By 1966, evolution of the instrument reached new heights with striking new features.

The American Vintage II 1966 Jazz Bass features a comfortable "U" shape hard rock maple neck, and it plays like a dream with a 7.25" radius round-lam rosewood fingerboard and vintage tall frets. Characteristic of production in 1966, this J-Bass® is offered with white neck binding, pearl dots, two volume controls with master tone, matching painted headstock and 4-ply tortoiseshell pickguard. The 4-saddle bridge with threaded saddles, vintage-style "lollipop" tuners and Pure Vintage '66 Jazz Bass pickups deliver classic thump and style.

The instruments in the American Vintage II series are direct descendants of the original Fenders: designed for players with a fine appreciation for vintage Fender tone and feel and built with unmatched quality, down to the last screw. These are Fender electrics in their purest form: Fender American Vintage II, the stuff of legends.


Features:

  • Lake Placid Blue Gloss Nitro Finish
  • Alder Body
  • Maple Neck
  • Gloss Nitro Neck Finish
  • 1966 "U" Shape Neck
  • 34" Scale Length
  • 20 Vintage Tall Frets
  • 7.25" Radius Fingerboard
  • 1.5 Width Bone Nut
  • 3-Ply Parchment Pickguard
  • Pearloid Dot Position Inlays
  • Pure Vintage '66 Single-Coil Jazz Bass Pickups
  • Master Volume (Neck) Master Volume (Bridge) and Master Tone Black Plastic Controls
  • Fender Pure Vintage Lollipop Tuning Machines
  • Fender Pure Vintage 4-Saddle with Threaded Steel saddles
  • Nickel/Chrome Hardware

Includes:

  • Fender Vintage Black Hardshell Case Mounted Chrome Pickup and Bridge Cover
  • Fender Accessories Package

item.title: Alusonic Django Basic 4 - Red — $1,889
item.description:
$1,889 · Brand New · SoCal Bass & Fx

The Alusonic Django Basic 4 pairs bold Italian design with modern boutique craftsmanship in a bass that's built to perform. A striking Black finish, its chambered ash body delivers exceptional resonance while keeping the instrument lightweight and perfectly balanced. The 24-fret hard maple fretboard offers a smooth, fast-playing feel with outstanding note clarity, making the Django Basic 4 equally comfortable for intricate solos, technical passages, and solid groove work.

Designed for maximum versatility, the Django Basic 4 features an active preamp with passive bypass, giving players the flexibility to switch between powerful active tone shaping and the organic response of passive operation. A single-coil neck pickup and humbucker bridge pickup, controlled by a 5-way pickup selector, provide an impressive range of sounds—from vintage warmth and articulate fingerstyle tones to aggressive modern punch. Whether on stage or in the studio, this handcrafted Alusonic bass delivers premium tone, effortless playability, and the innovative performance that has made Alusonic a favorite among discerning bassists worldwide.

Material: Chambered Select Ash

Tone & Electronics

item.title: 2020 Fender Custom Shop 1964 Jazz Bass Electric Bass Relic Black + COA OHSC — $3,795
item.description:
$3,795 · Excellent · Lovies Guitars

Another quality Bass from Lovies Guitars!

Lovies Guitars is excited to present this 2020 Fender Custom Shop 1964 Jazz Bass Relic Electric Bass finished in Black. This Custom Shop Jazz Bass recreates one of Fender’s most iconic vintage bass designs, capturing the look, feel, and tone of a legendary 1964-era instrument. Built by Fender’s master craftsmen, this Relic model delivers the unmistakable Jazz Bass character with modern reliability and exceptional attention to vintage detail.

The Jazz Bass has long been celebrated for its comfortable offset body shape, fast-playing neck, and versatile tonal range. Featuring dual single-coil pickups, this bass delivers the classic Fender sound with tight lows, punchy mids, and articulate highs that sit perfectly in any mix. From vintage soul and funk to rock, pop, and studio work, the Jazz Bass remains one of the most versatile instruments ever created.

The Black Relic finish gives this Custom Shop example the authentic appearance of a well-loved vintage instrument, with carefully applied aging throughout by Fender’s Custom Shop team. Combining vintage-inspired specifications with premium craftsmanship, this bass offers the feel and character players seek from a high-end Fender Custom Shop instrument.

This bass is all original (OG) and comes complete with its Certificate of Authenticity (COA) and Original Hardshell Case (OHSC). Please note the thumb rest/thumb piece is missing.

Condition: 9.9/10 - Excellent. Factory Relic finish with intentional aging from Fender Custom Shop. Aside from the missing thumb piece, this bass is exceptionally clean and presents beautifully.

item.title: 1988 Steinberger XM2 Headless Electric Bass Black + OGB — $3,295
item.description:
$3,295 · Very Good · Lovies Guitars

Another quality Guitar from Lovies Guitars!

Lovies Guitars is excited to present this 1988 Steinberger XM2 Headless Electric Bass finished in Black. The Steinberger XM2 is an iconic instrument from one of the most innovative eras in bass design. Known for its compact, headless construction, incredible tuning stability, and effortless playability, the XM2 became a favorite among touring professionals for its reliability, balanced feel, and unmistakably modern aesthetic. Built during the golden age of Steinberger innovation, this bass continues to be highly sought after by players and collectors alike.

The XM2 delivers a focused, punchy tone with exceptional clarity and articulation across the entire frequency spectrum. Its active electronics provide a wide range of tonal flexibility, making it equally capable of tight, aggressive rock tones, articulate slap sounds, and warm fingerstyle response. The compact body and headless design eliminate neck dive while offering superb balance and comfort during long performances.

Finished in classic Black, the XM2 has the unmistakable futuristic styling that made Steinberger famous while remaining incredibly practical for modern musicians. Lightweight, roadworthy, and built for performance, this bass continues to stand as one of the most innovative electric bass designs ever produced.

This bass is all original (OG) and comes complete with its Original Gig Bag (OGB).

Condition: 8.5/10 - Very Good. Honest player wear throughout including buckle rash on the back, along with light cosmetic wear across the front and back of the bass. Overall, it remains structurally sound, plays exceptionally well, and retains the character expected of a well-maintained vintage Steinberger.

Case: Original Gig Bag (OGB)
Condition: 8.5/10 - Very Good

item.title: Brand New 2025 Bill Nash Bass, PB-52 Bass Guitar, lollar pickup — $2,799
item.description:
$2,799 · Brand New · Bend Guitar Den

Brand New, 2025, Nash precision bass. Light and resonant. Beautiful wood grain, perfect tone, Beautiful frets, Ash, very resonant, wonderful action, and the one Lollar, simplicity itself. And nothing plays better than an aged Bill Nash Bass. This is how Leo meant his guitars to play, feel and sound. This one is a new 2025, never displayed Nash PB-52. Perfect set-up. Great tone.

You have to experience it to believe how comfortable it is to play an expertly aged guitar. And Bill Nash is the expert. Only high end components. All USA made. I have never played a guitar that is set-up as nicely as a Nash when it arrives in the store, and this includes Gibsons, Rickenbackers, and American made Fenders. Beautiful cloth wiring, very disciplined, no sloppy soldering, precise, accurate and sturdy.

Great wood. C-neck, dead-straight.

Nice full sounding, very powerful, very articulated Lollar.

This bass has great resonance and you forget what great resonance is on an electric when you haven’t heard it in awhile. You will never find a guitar this resonant off the wall at Guitar Center, or through the mail from Musician’s Friend. A combination of the wood that Nash hand-selects, the very thin coat of nitrocellulose lacquer, a properly seated neck pocket, and the appropriate density of the woods used. Combine this with the Lollars and you really have a match made in heaven. Finally a guitar that sounds and plays like the originals did in the late 50′s. This is a guitar that can last you a lifetime, and just get better over the years.

Includes Original Hard Shell Case.

The bass is brand new (well you know) in the case, never displayed and includes the full Nash warranty.

Nash PB-52
Case: Nash Hardshell Case Included
Aging: Medium
Finish: Three Tone Sunburst
Body: Ash
Neck: Maple

Neck Carve: Medium C

Pickups: Lollar
Electronics: USA 5-way

We are a brick and mortar guitar store (Bend Guitar Den in Bend Oregon) and Nash Dealer. If you don't see exactly what you want, call us and we can have it custom ordered for you. 541-977-6630.

item.title: Fender Player II Precision Bass Cactus Gray, Free Shipping! — $849
item.description:
$849 · Brand New · City Music Annex

Step into the spotlight and experience iconic Fender® sound and style with the Player II Precision Bass® — a stage-ready bass guitar with contemporary updates to power your performance and inspire your playing.

Weight on this particular bass is 9lbs 0oz.

The Player II Precision Bass radiates timeless Fender charm, but under the hood, it's primed for today's players. Everything about the neck is designed for fast and fluid playability, from the Modern “C”-profile with silky satin urethane finish on the back to the comfy 9.5”-radius slab rosewood or maple fingerboard with smooth rolled edges and 20 medium jumbo frets. A classic alder body is available in both timeless Fender finishes and never-before-seen colors unearthed from the archives. Player Series Alnico V Split-Coil P bass® pickups offer sweet highs, musical mids and seismic lows that elevate any genre. An adjustable 4-saddle bridge, single-groove steel saddles and open-gear tuners ensure precise tuning stability for the flexibility to explore endless sonic possibilities.

Perfect for crafting your own sound, the Player II Precision Bass has the looks, tone and feel that only a Fender delivers.

Features

  • Contoured Alder Body
  • Modern "C" Neck Profile
  • 9.5“-Radius Maple or Rosewood Fingerboard with Rolled Edges
  • Player Series Alnico V Split-Coil Precision Bass® Pickups
  • 4-Saddle Bridge with Single-Groove Steel “Barrel” Saddles
  • Open-Gear Tuning Machines

item.title: Schecter Charles Berthoud CB-5 bass in See Thru Black Satin — $1,549
item.description:
$1,549 · Brand New · LV Guitars

Schecter CB-5 Charles Berthoud Bass See Thru Black Satin

The CB-5 delivers a balanced, ergonomic playing experience with its thin "C" neck profile and 35" extended scale that feels articulate and controlled under the fingers. Finished in elegant See Thru Black Satin with a flamed maple top, this signature model combines striking visual appeal with the professional-grade stability and sustain demanded by solo performers and advanced players. Built as a true thru-neck instrument with carbon fiber reinforcement, the CB-5 is engineered for precision and reliability across any playing style.

Construction & Playability

The neck-thru design with 5-ply walnut, padauk stringers, and dual carbon fiber rods ensures maximum rigidity and sustain while the Ultra Access heel allows seamless upper fret navigation. A thin "C" neck shape measuring 20mm at the 1st fret and 22mm at the 12th fret provides comfortable reach, while the 16" fretboard radius and 24 jumbo frets on rosewood deliver smooth, fast playability with abalone offset dot inlays and side markers for visual reference.

Tone & Electronics

Dual EMG 40HZ pickups paired with an EMG 3-band active EQ system deliver expansive tonal range from deep, articulate lows to crisp, defined highs, adapting effortlessly to fingerstyle, slap, or tapping techniques. The 35" scale length ensures tight low-end articulation and clarity on the extended B string, while the Schecter Diamond Custom Bass bridge provides solid resonance and reliable tuning stability.

Key Features
  • Ash body with flamed maple top – premium tonewoods delivering rich tone and striking aesthetics
  • Thru-neck construction with Ultra Access – maximum sustain and smooth upper fret access
  • 5-ply walnut neck with padauk stringers and dual carbon fiber reinforcement rods – enhanced stability and sustain
  • 35" extended scale length – tight, articulate low end and improved clarity
  • Thin "C" neck profile – 20mm at 1st fret, 22mm at 12th fret for ergonomic reach
  • 24 jumbo frets on rosewood with abalone offset dots – smooth playing surface with elegant inlay markers
  • Dual EMG 40HZ pickups with active 3-band EQ – wide tonal range and pro-grade tone shaping
  • Graph Tech Black Tusq XL nut at 45mm width – precision string definition and durability
  • Schecter Diamond Custom Bass bridge – resonant and tuning-stable hardware
  • Grover tuners with 2-way truss rod – reliable tuning and adjustability via heel spoke wheel
  • Black hardware throughout – cohesive visual design with See Thru Black Satin finish
  • 9.52 pounds – balanced weight for extended playing sessions

The CB-5 stands as a professional instrument built for bassists who demand uncompromised sustain, tonal flexibility, and playability in both solo and ensemble contexts.

item.title: Sire P6 with gig bag — $429
item.description:
$429 · Excellent · CW Guitars

Greetings

Up for sale is my Sire P6 4-string bass. The bass is in excellent condition and everything works perfectly. The only change I have done is to replace the plastic input jack with a Switchcraft stereo jack. They work much better and last a whole lot longer.

I have played this bass at church numerous times, and it sounds fantastic in the mix. Plus the weight is under 8 pounds, which makes this a rare bird IMO.

I'm setting the price low, and will include the pictured gig bag. The bass will ship via UPS within 24 hours of payment, unless you buy it on Saturday evening. In that case it will go out the following Monday.

I will consider any reasonable offer, but lo-ball offers need to look elsewhere. You can check my feedback here on Reverb.

If you are looking for a great sounding and playing 4 string bass - this is the one you will want.

item.title: Squire Precision II Bass Made in Korea 1989 W/ Case — $294.40
item.description:
$294.40 · Good · Rads Gear

For sale is a Circa 1989 Squire Precision II. This is one of the older Squire models that is made in Korea. It plays and sounds like a Precision should with a medium action. The neck feels very similar to the E series Japan necks that I have played. It is in good shape with scratches and marks here and there which is to be expected for a bass of its age. It is a plywood body so it is very lightweight. It could likely benefit from fresh strings and a proper setup. There is a tiny crack in the pickguard near the output jack but still seems solid. Included is a vintage chipboard case.
